summary: Completed frontend testing of mobile-first responsive design, TenantsManagement page, and CreateUserWizard. All requested features tested and PASSED. Mobile sidebar toggle, Quick Actions section, and full 5-step user creation wizard flow verified.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - minor issue with Recharts ResponsiveContainer

passed_tests: 1. Mobile-first Responsive Design for AdminDashboard - ✓ PASS
- Mobile header visible with date and filter button
- Welcome card displays user name 'مرحباً أستاذ أحمد زلط'
- Sidebar closes when toggle clicked again
- Contains 5 action buttons: إضافة مدرسة, إنشاء مستخدم, إدارة القواعد, إعدادات النظام, التقارير
- 'إنشاء مستخدم' button opens Create User Wizard
- Dialog opens with title 'إنشاء حساب مستخدم جديد'
- Roles: مدير العمليات التشغيلية, مسؤول الإدارة التقنية, مسؤول دعم المستخدمين, محلل بيانات المنصة, مسؤول أمن المنصة, حساب اختبار, معلم
- Role selection highlights card with green checkmark
- Form fields: الاسم الكامل, البريد الإلكتروني, رقم الهاتف, المدينة, القسم, حالة الحساب, ملاحظات
- data-testid attributes present: user-fullname-input, user-email-input, user-phone-input
- Default permissions pre-selected based on role
- Select All/Deselect All buttons per category
- Success message 'تم إنشاء الحساب بنجاح!' displayed
- Login credentials shown (email and temp password)
- 'نسخ رسالة الترحيب' (Copy Welcome Message) button present
- Form fields display in single column
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - consider adding minWidth/minHeight props to fix
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'مستخدم اختبار جديد' with email 'testuser123@nassaq.test' via CreateUserWizard (MOCKED - not saved to backend)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile-first responsive design fully tested. AdminDashboard has mobile header, sidebar toggle, and Quick Actions section. TenantsManagement page shows schools in table format with search. CreateUserWizard has 5 steps: Role Selection (7 roles), User Data, Permissions (60 permissions), Password Generation, Success Screen. User creation is MOCKED (uses setTimeout simulation, not connected to backend API).

mocked_apis_list: User creation in CreateUserWizard - uses setTimeout simulation instead of real API call
mocked_apis.note: CreateUserWizard shows success screen but does not actually create user in database

components_tested: Mobile header with date and filters
